seo.title: Odoo Consulting | SSW
seo.description: Need an Odoo consultant? SSW brings 30+ years of Australian enterprise software experience to Odoo implementation, customisation & integration

blocks.heading: We build Odoo to support how your team actually works.
blocks.description: Most Odoo implementations work in the demo. We build the ones that survive real operations, real data and years of growth, backed by 30+ years of enterprise software delivery in Australia.

blocks.heading: Trusted in Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane and Newcastle by
Where Odoo projects usually go wrong
blocks.description: The software gets installed without much trouble. Mapping the real workflow , migrating clean data, and training people to actually use the new system are the parts that usually get compressed.

steps.heading: Built around a demo, not your day-today
steps.description: Odoo ships with sensible defaults for a generic business. Most implementations configure those defaults and call it finished, so staff end up entering the same information twice: once in Odoo because someone told them to, and once in the spreadsheet that actually gets used

steps.heading: Data that still lives in five places
steps.description: Odoo can hold your finance, sales and warehouse data in one system. Most rollouts stop short of connecting it to the accounting software, the website, or whatever the warehouse team already runs, so someone is still exporting CSVs by hand every week.

steps.heading: One person manages everything
steps.description: A lot of Odoo work gets done by a single person who picks it up as they go. It holds up fine until that person goes on leave, changes roles, or leaves the company. After that, nobody knows why a particular workflow was set up the way it was

blocks.figure: Video: Every client deserves a Team! Link Microsoft Teams with your CRM (4 mins)
blocks.heading: Why choose SSW?
blocks.description: SSW's Consulting Services have delivered best-in-class Microsoft solutions for thousands of clients in 15 countries for more than 30 years.

highlights.title: Deep expertise

highlights.title: Results over rhetoric
highlights.desc2: Mainstream tech, real ROI, and clear action items. Every decision is measured by one question: does it actually work?

faqs.question: How much does it cost?
faqs.answer: Every engagement is scoped to your goals, so there's no single price. The initial call is always 100% **free**. The specification review will be used to give the most accurate estimation possible for a projects scope, price and duration.

faqs.question: Do you work with our existing team?
faqs.answer: Yes! We can either take over a project from end-to-end with our own team at SSW, or embed our developers into your existing team.

faqs.question: Can you rescue a project that's already in trouble?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! SSW can support a range of projects, from large version upgrades, migrations, greenfield projects, and brownfield projects.

faqs.question: How does SSW ensure quality and success of a software project?
faqs.answer:
Quality and success are the heart of our processes; we use:

* Clean Architecture: Designing for scalability, testability, and maintainability.
* Scrum Methodology: Ensuring transparency, client involvement, and adaptability through fast feedback loops.
* DevOps Practices: Streamlining development and deployment for faster delivery and reliability.
* Best Practices: Adhering to and sharing industry best practices (via SSW Rules and SSW TV).
* Expert Teams: Employing rigorously hired and continuously developed technical experts.
* Strong Communication: Keeping clients informed and involved throughout the project lifecycle.

blocks.heading: Let's build something you're proud of
blocks.description: Get in touch and we'll set up an initial meeting to show you where we'd start
